name: Mass Cloud Resource Deletion
description: Detects bulk deletion of cloud resources indicative of a destructive attack
query:
// Detect mass cloud resource deletion
// Trigger on multiple delete operations in cloud audit logs
events from cloud_audit
where event_name matches "(?i)(Delete|Terminate|Remove|Destroy|Deregister)"
group by user_identity
having count(*) > 10
within 300 seconds
